fields.title: A.W. Tozer
fields.description: American Christian pastor, author, magazine editor, and spiritual mentor.

fields.title: W.A. Criswell
fields.description: Pastor, author, and a two-term elected president of the Southern Baptist Convention.

fields.title: Bryan Loritts
fields.description: Pastor of Abundant Life Church in Silicon Valley, California. He also serves as the President of the Kainos Movement.

fields.title: Alex Montoya
fields.description: Senior pastor at FFBC since 1972 and holds a Master in Divinity and Master in Theology degrees from Talbot Theological Seminary.

fields.title: Ravi Zacharias
fields.description: Ravi spent 48 years commending the Christian faith and addressing life’s great existential questions of origin, meaning, morality, and destiny. He authored or edited over 25 books in the fields of theology, apologetics, comparative religion, and philosophy.

fields.title: Mike Kelsey
fields.description: Mike Kelsey is Campus Pastor at the McLean Bible Church Montgomery County location and a member of the Teaching Team.

fields.title: Billy Graham
fields.description: Prominent evangelical Christian leader and an ordained Southern Baptist minister.

fields.title: Francis Chan
fields.description: Pastor and former teaching pastor of a Church in Simi Valley, California.

fields.title: Mez McConnell
fields.description: Pastor for Niddrie Community Church, near Edinburgh and Director of 20schemes which is dedicated to revitalizing and planting gospel churches in Scotland's poorest communities.

fields.title: Mike Riccardi
fields.description: Pastor of Local Outreach Ministries at Grace Church.

fields.title: Alistair Begg
fields.description: Alistair Begg is Senior Pastor at Parkside Church in Cleveland, Ohio, and the Bible teacher on Truth For Life, which is heard on the radio and online around the world.

fields.title: Doug Wilson
fields.description: Conservative Reformed and evangelical theologian, pastor at Christ Church in Moscow, Idaho.

fields.title: Shai Linne
fields.description: Christian rapper and a member of Risen Christ Fellowship in Philadelphia, PA.

fields.title: Jeff Durbin
fields.description: Pastor of Apologia Church in Tempe, and has worked for many years as a hospital-chaplain.

fields.title: Matt Chandler
fields.description: Pastor at the Village Church in Flower Mound, Texas, and the President of the Acts 29 Network.

fields.title: Michael Mahoney
fields.description: Serves as pastor of administration over Grace Church.

fields.title: Paul Washer
fields.description: Pastor, Missionary and founder of HeartCry Missionary Society.

fields.title: John MacArthur
fields.description: Pastor of Grace Community Church, President of The Master's University and Seminary. Founder and teacher at Grace to You.

fields.title: Nate Pickowicz
fields.description: Pastor of Harvest Bible Church in Gilmanton Iron Works, New Hampshire.

fields.title: Joni Eareckson Tada
fields.description: Evangelical Christian author, radio host, and founder of Joni and Friends, an organization "accelerating Christian ministry in the disability community.

fields.title: John Piper
fields.description: Pastor and teacher of Desiring God and chancellor of Bethlehem College & Seminary. For 30+ years, he served as pastor of Bethlehem Baptist Church.

fields.title: Steven Lawson
fields.description: President and founder of OnePassion Ministries, a ministry designed to equip biblical expositors to bring about a new reformation in the church.

fields.title: Josh Buice
fields.description: Senior pastor of Pray’s Mill Baptist Church and founding director for the G3 Conference.

fields.title: Jay Adams
fields.description: Reformed Christian author who has written more than 100 books.

fields.title: David Platt
fields.description: Pastor at McLean Bible Church in Washington, D.C. He is the founder and president of Radical.

fields.title: Brooks Simpson
fields.description: Pastor at Grace Community Church in North Liberty, IA.

fields.title: Leonard Ravenhill
fields.description: Evangelist and author who focused on the subjects of prayer and revival.

fields.title: Kevin Carson
fields.description: Pastor of the Sunrise Baptist Church in Ozark, MO.

fields.title: Rusty Thomas
fields.description: Nationally recognized public speaker, author, radio guest, and founder of Elijah Ministries and the National Director of Operation Save America.

fields.title: R.C. Sproul
fields.description: Theologian, pastor, author, founder of Ligonier Ministries, executive editor of Tabletalk Magazine, and chancellor of Reformation Bible College.

fields.title: Nicolas Ellen
fields.description: Senior Pastor of Community of Faith Bible Church in Houston, Texas, and a Professor of Biblical Counseling at the College of Biblical Studies.

fields.title: Eric Mason
fields.description: Pastor of Epiphany Fellowship in Philadelphia, PA.

fields.title: Martin Loyd-Jones
fields.description: Protestant minister and medical doctor who was influential in the Reformed wing of the British evangelical movement in the 20th century. For almost 30 years, he was the minister of Westminster Chapel in London.

fields.title: Phil Johnson
fields.description: Executive director of Grace to You ministry and ordained elder and pastor at Grace Community Church.

fields.title: Eric Alexander
fields.description: Minister in the Church of Scotland

fields.title: Voddie Baucham
fields.description: Dean of the seminary at African Christian University in Lusaka, Zambia.

fields.title: Henry Mahan
fields.description: Henry had wide experience in the pastoral ministry as well as a widely traveled conference speaker and evangelist.

fields.title: Tony Payne
fields.description: Tony Payne is an ordained minister who serves as the publishing director of Matthias Media.

fields.title: Nathan Busenitz
fields.description: Co-pastors of Cornerstone fellowship group at Grace Church.

fields.title: Tim Challies
fields.description: Pioneer in the Christian blogosphere, having one of the most widely read and recognized Christian blogs anywhere.

fields.title: Conrad Mbewe
fields.description: Pastored Kabwata Baptist Church, Lusaka, Zambia for nearly three decades.

fields.title: James White
fields.description: Director of Alpha and Omega Ministries, an evangelical Reformed Christian apologetics organization. Author of more than 20 books.

fields.title: Albert Martin
fields.description: Served as pastor of Trinity Baptist Church in Montville, New Jersey, for more than forty years and he taught Pastoral Theology in the Trinity Ministerial Academy for twenty years.

fields.title: Greg Bahnsen
fields.description: American Calvinist philosopher, apologist, and debater. He was a minister in the Orthodox Presbyterian Church and a full-time Scholar in Residence for the Southern California Center for Christian Studies.

fields.title: Walter Martin
fields.description: American Baptist Christian minister and author who founded the Christian Research Institute in 1960.

fields.title: Paris Reidhead
fields.description: Christian missionary, teacher, writer, and advocate of economic development in impoverished nations.

fields.title: Derek Thomas
fields.description: Pastor and theologian known for his teaching, writing and editorial work.

fields.title: Marques Adams
fields.description: Marques Adams, who goes by the stage name Sevin, is an American Christian hip hop rapper.

fields.title: Vance Havner
fields.description: American evangelist and biblical conference speaker.

fields.title: Albert Mohler
fields.description: Theologian and the ninth president of the Southern Baptist Theological Seminary.

fields.title: Mike Fabarez
fields.description: Pastor of Compass Bible Church in Aliso Viejo, California. He is heard nationwide on the radio program Focal Point.

fields.title: Philip De Courcy
fields.description: Philip De Courcy is the senior pastor of Kindred Community Church in Anaheim Hills, California, and speaker on the daily radio program, Know The Truth.

fields.title: Paul Twiss
fields.description: Paul serves in the Steadfast fellowship group and as an instructor with Grace Equip.

fields.title: James Montgomery Boice
fields.description: James Montgomery Boice, Th.D. was a Christian theologian, Bible teacher, author, and speaker known for his writing on the authority of Scripture and the defence of Biblical inerrancy.

fields.title: Tony Miano
fields.description: Servant of the Lord as an itinerant preacher and open-air evangelist.

fields.title: Kevin DeYoung
fields.description: Kevin DeYoung is an American Reformed Evangelical theologian and author. He is currently the senior pastor at Christ Covenant Church.

fields.title: Austin Duncan
fields.description: College pastor at Grace Community Church. Training pastors at The Master’s Seminary.

fields.title: Stuart Olyott
fields.description: Stuart became a minister when he was 21 and has spent his life preaching as simply, seriously and vividly as possible, both in English and French. He has held pastorates in England, Switzerland and Wales, has preached in conferences on every continent, and is the author of several books.
